metadata.task: Determine whether the pendulum or the sliding block attains a higher maximum speed.
metadata.description: Work from the Energy Conservation on a Swing scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: When energy losses are neglected, both objects convert the same potential energy to kinetic energy and reach the same maximum speed.
reasoning: In an ideal frictionless system, gravitational potential energy is fully converted into kinetic energy.
